◎简　　介  

　　Ideologies collide with fatal results when a military drone contractor meets an enigmatic Pakistani businessman.Bean plays a private drone contractor who spends his workdays flying covert missions then returns to a family life of suburban mediocri ty — without his wife or son knowing about his secret life — until a whistle-blowing site exposes him to a deadly threat. Believing...
